ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flight_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the flight test was conducted */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft used for the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of flight test (e.g., stability, performance) */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during the test (e.g., weather, weight) */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the flight test was conducted */,
  "test_pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test pilot */,
  "test_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the flight test */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the flight test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_tests_test_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_tests_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model designation of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (e.g., fixed-wing, rotary-wing) */,
  "wing_span" REAL /* Wing span of the aircraft */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the aircraft */,
  "max_altitude" REAL /* Maximum altitude of the aircraft */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the aircraft */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control input */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated flight test */,
  "time" REAL /* Time when the control input was sent */,
  "control_value" REAL /* Value of the control input */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of control input (e.g., pitch, roll, yaw) */,
  "input_description" TEXT /* Description of the control input */,
  "input_source" TEXT /* Source of the control input (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_inputs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES flight_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., velocity, gyroscope) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the aircraft */,
  "sensor_range" REAL /* Range of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data analyzed */,
  "analyzed_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., stability, performance) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "analysis_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_analysis_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
